scan_log.summary: Strong discovery day led by two standout finds: a Blue Light Therapy Wand in early discovery phase (score 79) and a Neck Phone Holder for POV content creators (score 78). Both fully generic, no moat, high Gen Z demographic momentum. Portable Electric Lunch Box is the quietest mover on Amazon — utility-driven, strong triggers. LED Crystal Vase Lamp and Matte Cream Blush Stick round out solid mid-tier picks. Mini Facial Steamer and Hair Repair Mask are reliable growth-phase plays with clear supplier cost advantages.

products.signal_description: Blue light therapy for acne treatment is growing at a similar velocity to red light therapy but sits at under 5% of its search volume — a classic information arbitrage window. Growing organically in beauty TikTok and Reddit skincare communities. No dominant brand in the blue light wand category. High perceived value, low supplier cost ($15-25), strong retail price ceiling ($60-90).

products.product_name: Neck Phone Holder / POV Content Mount
products.signal_description: Wearable phone holder worn around neck/chest for hands-free POV filming. Content creators use it for cooking tutorials, DIY projects, and first-person vlogs. Organic adoption driven by Gen Z creators. Fully generic product — no brand moat, wide supply availability. Source <$5, retail $20-35.

Self-heating electric lunch containers rising on Amazon Movers & Shakers in the Kitchen & Dining category. Appeals to office workers, students, and commuters who want hot meals without a microwave. Completely generic product category — no brand dominance. Source $10-18, retail $35-55. Consistent daily use triggers (lunch every day).

LED vase lamps with rechargeable battery going viral on TikTok home decor. Described as casting a romantic glow — highly photogenic for #roomtour and #aesthetichome content. Perfect demo product for short-form video. Full generic supply chain on AliExpress. Source $8-15, retail $30-55.

products.product_name: Matte Cream Blush Stick (Multi-Use Face Color)
products.signal_description: Cream blush sticks with matte finish rising on Amazon Movers & Shakers in Beauty & Personal Care. Multi-use for cheeks, eyes, and lips appeals to minimalist beauty trend. No dominant brand in generic cream blush. Strong beauty TikTok presence. Source $2-5, retail $10-20.

Portable nano ionic facial steamers trending on TikTok BeautyTok in 2026. Positioned as at-home spa treatment. Highly visual product for demo content — steam rising on camera is compelling. Generic product with no meaningful brand moat below premium tier. Source $6-12, retail $25-45.

Hair repair masks rising on Google Trends — driven by awareness of heat styling and chemical damage. Strong at-home beauty routine narrative. Trending across Reddit beauty communities. Some brand presence (e.g. Olaplex) but generic formulations widely available. Source $3-8, retail $15-30.
